Contact Rare & Manuscript Collections

University Photography records, 1989-2001
Collection Number: 4-14-2883

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
University Photography records, 1989-2001
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
4-14-2883
Abstract:
Photographs, contact sheets, negatives, and slides depicting students and faculty, buildings, and campus events.
Creator:
Cornell University. University Photography
Cornell University. Photographic Services
Cornell University. Media Services. Photo Section
Cornell University. Cornell Publications Photography (Visual Services)
Quanitities:
77.4 cubic feet.
12 gigabytes.
Language:
Collection material in English
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY

University Photography was formed in 1989 upon the combination of Photographic Services, Cornell Publications Photography (Visual Services), and the Media Services Photo Section.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION

Photographs, contact sheets, negatives, and slides depicting students and faculty, buildings, and campus events.
NOTES

Only part of this collection representing faculty photographs is currently processed and represented in the finding aid.
SERIES LIST

Series I. Faculty and staff

INFORMATION FOR USERS
Cite As:

University Photography Records, #4-14-2883. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
SUBJECTS

Names:
Cornell University -- : Students.
Cornell University -- : Pictorial works.
Cornell University -- : Faculty.
Form and Genre Terms:
Negatives (photographic).
Slides (photographs).
Photographs.

Includes prints, slides, and negatives. Some files also contain printed matter about the subject.
